text: you may still be able to use a True Link Visa Card to access and spend these funds. True Link Visa Cards for ABLE Account holders are just one of the ways True Link supports people with disabilities; we are dedicated to providing life-changing financial solutions to this community. In fact, the Social Security Administration now provides guidelines in the Program Operations Manual System (POMS) for using True Link Visa Cards to make disbursements from special needs/supplemental needs trusts for beneficiaries who receive SSI.
